---
title: "Notes"
---

This section collects the method notes and source-based reading notes that support the rest of the site.

## Matching

Use this group when you want the conceptual and literature background for matching and weighting:

- [Matching and Weighting](matching-and-weighting.qmd) for the high-level method overview
- [LaLonde Background Appendix](lalonde-background-appendix.qmd) for benchmark context
- [Entropy-Based Weighting with WeightIt](weightit-entropy-balancing-notes.qmd) for weighting-specific design notes
- the source notes on *The Mixtape*, *The Effect*, and Gertler for detailed chapter-by-chapter recall

## Synthetic Control

Use this group for synthetic-control concepts, teaching data, and source mapping:

- [Synthetic Control](synthetic-control.qmd)
- [Synthetic Control Teaching Data](synthetic-control-teaching-data.qmd)
- [Synthetic Control Sources](synthetic-control-sources.qmd)

## Other Methods

The remaining notes cover the broader quasi-experimental toolkit:

- [Difference-in-Differences](difference-in-differences.qmd)
- [Regression Discontinuity](regression-discontinuity.qmd)
- [Comparing Methods](comparing-methods.qmd)
- [Choosing a Method](choosing-a-method.qmd)
